name: display_discovery_artifact_check
summary: Simulated user confirms core focal and support roles so display discovery produces a visible understanding update card.

displayTruth.mainFocal: HiddenTree is the main focal point and emotional anchor.
displayTruth.supportingAccents: CandyCanes support the scene as foreground rhythm and accent.
displayTruth.characterProps: Snowman and Train are themed supporting character props around the tree.
displayTruth.backgroundLayers: Floods and upper snowflakes are more background and atmosphere than focal story elements.
displayTruth.preferredConversationStyle: Answer directly and move the designer forward once they understand the broad roles.
